scenes.setting: Blackthorn Security Company reception office, Klein wakes the dozing Rozanne
scenes.text_anchor: Upon seeing the signboard, Klein felt surprised yet found it

scenes.setting: Corridor and underground stone staircase toward Chanis Gate; Leonard glimpsed typing
scenes.text_anchor: Okay. Klein quickly followed behind. In his mind, he pondered

scenes.setting: The Keeper room before Chanis Gate; Klein signs the Nighthawks contract
scenes.text_anchor: The room Rozanne was referring to was just in front
